name: Versatile
effects: All ability scores increase by 1.

name: Darkvision
effects: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light.

name: Fey Ancestry
effects: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed.

name: Trance
effects: Elves meditate deeply, remaining semiconscious for 4 hours.

name: Keen Senses
effects: Proficiency in the Perception skill.

name: Elf Weapon Training
effects: Proficiency with longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

name: Cantrip
effects: You know one cantrip of your choice from the wizard spell list.

name: Dwarven Resilience
effects: Advantage on saving throws against poison and resistance against poison damage.

name: Dwarven Combat Training
effects: Proficiency with battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.

name: Stonecunning
effects: Double proficiency bonus on History checks related to stonework.

name: Dwarven Toughness
effects: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 every time you gain a level.

name: Lucky
effects: When you roll a 1 on the d20 for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, reroll it.

name: Brave
effects: Advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

name: Halfling Nimbleness
effects: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

name: Naturally Stealthy
effects: You can attempt to hide even when obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

name: Fighting Style
effects: Adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty.

name: Second Wind
effects: Regain hit points equal to 1d10 + fighter level once per short rest.

name: Action Surge
effects: Take one additional action on your turn once per short rest.

name: Martial Archetype
effects: Choose a martial archetype to emulate.

name: Extra Attack
effects: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

name: Indomitable
effects: Reroll a saving throw once per long rest.

name: Extra Attack (2)
effects: Attack three times whenever you take the Attack action.

name: Indomitable (2 uses)
effects: Reroll a saving throw up to twice per long rest.

name: Action Surge (2 uses)
effects: Use Action Surge twice per short rest.

name: Indomitable (3 uses)
effects: Reroll a saving throw up to three times per long rest.

name: Extra Attack (3)
effects: Attack four times whenever you take the Attack action.

name: Spellcasting
effects: You can cast prepared or known spells using your class spellcasting ability.

name: Arcane Recovery
effects: Recover expended spell slots during a short rest once per day.

name: Arcane Tradition
effects: Choose a school of magic to study.

name: 3rd-Level Spells
effects: You can now prepare and cast 3rd-level spells.

name: Arcane Tradition Feature
effects: Gain a feature from your chosen arcane tradition.

name: 5th-Level Spells
effects: You can now prepare and cast 5th-level spells.

name: Spell Mastery
effects: Choose a 1st- and a 2nd-level spell; cast them at their lowest level without expending a slot.

name: Signature Spells
effects: Choose two 3rd-level spells as signature spells; you always have them prepared and can cast each once per short rest.

name: Divine Domain
effects: Choose a domain to shape your divine gifts.

name: Channel Divinity
effects: Channel divine energy directly from your deity once per short rest.

name: Divine Domain Feature
effects: Gain a feature from your chosen divine domain.

name: Destroy Undead (CR 1/2)
effects: When an undead of CR 1/2 or lower fails its saving throw against your Turn Undead, it is destroyed.

name: Channel Divinity (2 uses)
effects: Channel Divinity can be used twice between rests.

name: Destroy Undead (CR 1)
effects: Turn Undead destroys undead of CR 1 or lower.

name: Divine Intervention
effects: Implore your deity to intervene once per 7 days. Roll percentile dice equal to or under your cleric level to succeed.

name: Destroy Undead (CR 2)
effects: Turn Undead destroys undead of CR 2 or lower.

name: Destroy Undead (CR 3)
effects: Turn Undead destroys undead of CR 3 or lower.

name: Destroy Undead (CR 4)
effects: Turn Undead destroys undead of CR 4 or lower.

name: Channel Divinity (3 uses)
effects: Channel Divinity can be used three times between rests.

name: Divine Intervention (Improved)
effects: Your Divine Intervention call succeeds automatically.

name: Expertise
effects: Double your proficiency bonus for chosen skills or thieves' tools.

name: Sneak Attack (1d6)
effects: Deal 1d6 extra damage once per turn when you have advantage or an ally nearby.

name: Thieves' Cant
effects: Learn thieves' cant.

name: Cunning Action
effects: Dash, Disengage, or Hide as a bonus action.

name: Roguish Archetype
effects: Choose a roguish archetype to emulate.

name: Sneak Attack (2d6)
effects: Sneak Attack damage increases to 2d6.

name: Uncanny Dodge
effects: Use your reaction to halve an attacker's damage when they hit you.

name: Sneak Attack (3d6)
effects: Sneak Attack damage increases to 3d6.

name: Evasion
effects: Take no damage on a successful Dexterity saving throw, and half damage on a failure.

name: Sneak Attack (4d6)
effects: Sneak Attack damage increases to 4d6.

name: Archetype Feature
effects: Gain a feature from your chosen archetype.

name: Sneak Attack (5d6)
effects: Sneak Attack damage increases to 5d6.

name: Reliable Talent
effects: Treat any d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10 for ability checks you're proficient in.

name: Sneak Attack (6d6)
effects: Sneak Attack damage increases to 6d6.

name: Sneak Attack (7d6)
effects: Sneak Attack damage increases to 7d6.

name: Blindsense
effects: Aware of any hidden or invisible creature within 10 feet while you can hear.

name: Slippery Mind
effects: Proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

name: Sneak Attack (8d6)
effects: Sneak Attack damage increases to 8d6.

name: Sneak Attack (9d6)
effects: Sneak Attack damage increases to 9d6.

name: Elusive
effects: No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

name: Sneak Attack (10d6)
effects: Sneak Attack damage increases to 10d6.

name: Stroke of Luck
effects: Turn a failed attack or ability check into a success once per short rest.

name: Improved Critical
effects: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

name: Sculpt Spells
effects: Protect allies from your evocation spells.

name: Disciple of Life
effects: Healing spells are more effective.

name: Fast Hands
effects: Use Cunning Action to make Sleight of Hand checks, use thieves' tools, or take the Use an Object action.

name: Second-Story Work
effects: Gain improved climbing and jumping.

name: Ability Score Improvement
effects: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each.

name: Rage
effects: Enter a rage as a bonus action. While raging: advantage on STR checks and saves, bonus rage damage on melee attacks, resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage. Ends early if you don't attack or take damage. 2 uses at level 1, recovering on long rest.

name: Unarmored Defense
effects: While not wearing armor, your AC equals 10 + DEX modifier + CON modifier.

name: Weapon Mastery
effects: You can use the mastery property of one weapon you're proficient with per turn.

name: Danger Sense
effects: Advantage on DEX saving throws against effects you can see, unless blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

name: Reckless Attack
effects: When you make your first attack on your turn, you can attack recklessly. Doing so gives you advantage on melee weapon attack rolls using STR this turn, but attack rolls against you have advantage until your next turn.

name: Primal Knowledge
effects: Gain proficiency in one skill from the barbarian list.

name: Primal Path
effects: Choose a Primal Path that shapes the nature of your rage.

name: Extra Attack
effects: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

name: Fast Movement
effects: Your speed increases by 10 feet while you aren't wearing heavy armor.

name: Feral Instinct
effects: Advantage on Initiative rolls. If surprised at the start of combat, you can act normally on your first turn if you enter your rage before doing anything else.

name: Instinctive Pounce
effects: As part of entering a rage, you can move up to half your speed.

name: Brutal Strike
effects: When you use Reckless Attack, you can forgo advantage on one attack to instead deal an additional 1d10 damage on a hit (Forceful Blow or Hamstring Blow).

name: Relentless Rage
effects: If you drop to 0 HP while raging and don't die outright, make a DC 10 CON save. On success, you drop to 1 HP instead. DC increases by 5 each use per rage.

name: Improved Brutal Strike
effects: Brutal Strike damage increases to 2d10 and you gain access to two more Brutal Strike options.

name: Persistent Rage
effects: Your rage is so fierce it ends early only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it.

name: Improved Brutal Strike (3d10)
effects: Brutal Strike damage increases to 3d10.

name: Indomitable Might
effects: If your total for a STR check is less than your STR score, you can use your STR score in place of the total.

name: Primal Champion
effects: Your STR and CON each increase by 4. Your maximum for those scores increases to 24.

name: Bardic Inspiration
effects: As a bonus action, grant a creature within 60 feet a Bardic Inspiration die (d6). The creature can add the die to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw within 10 minutes. The die increases to d8 at level 5, d10 at level 10, and d12 at level 15.

name: Expertise
effects: Choose two of your skill proficiencies. Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check you make that uses either of the chosen proficiencies.

name: Jack of All Trades
effects: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded down) to any ability check that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus.

name: Bard College
effects: Choose a bard college that gives you new features.

name: Font of Inspiration
effects: Regain all expended Bardic Inspiration uses when you finish a short or long rest.

name: Countercharm
effects: As an action, you can start a performance that lasts until the end of your next turn. Friendly creatures within 30 feet of you have advantage on saving throws against being frightened or charmed.

name: Expertise (2nd)
effects: Choose two more skill proficiencies to gain double proficiency bonus on.

name: Bardic Inspiration (d10)
effects: Bardic Inspiration die increases to d10.

name: Magical Secrets
effects: Choose two spells from any class. The chosen spells count as bard spells for you.

name: Bardic Inspiration (d12)
effects: Bardic Inspiration die increases to d12.

name: Superior Inspiration
effects: When you roll Initiative and have no Bardic Inspiration uses remaining, you regain one use.

name: Words of Creation
effects: You master the Words of Creation. You can simultaneously target two creatures with Power Word Heal and Power Word Kill.

name: Druidic
effects: You know Druidic, the secret language of druids. You can speak it and use it to leave hidden messages.

name: Wild Shape
effects: Magically assume the shape of a beast you have seen before. Challenge Rating and form limitations improve as you level.

name: Druid Circle
effects: Choose a druid circle that provides additional features.

name: Wild Shape Improvement
effects: You can transform into beasts with a higher CR and additional capabilities.

name: Beast Spells
effects: You can cast many of your druid spells in any shape you assume using Wild Shape.

name: Timeless Body
effects: The primal magic that you wield causes you to age more slowly. For every 10 years that pass, your body ages only 1 year.

name: Archdruid
effects: You can use your Wild Shape an unlimited number of times. Additionally, you can ignore the verbal and somatic components of your druid spells, as well as any material components that lack a cost.

name: Martial Arts
effects: Use DEX instead of STR for unarmed strikes and monk weapons. Unarmed strike damage is a Martial Arts die (d6 at level 1, scaling up). Make one unarmed strike as a bonus action when you take the Attack action with a monk weapon or unarmed strike.

name: Unarmored Defense
effects: While not wearing armor or using a shield, your AC equals 10 + DEX modifier + WIS modifier.

name: Monk's Focus
effects: Spend Focus Points (equal to your monk level) to fuel special features. Regain all spent points after a short or long rest.

name: Unarmored Movement
effects: Your speed increases by 10 feet while not wearing armor or a shield. Increases further as you level.

name: Uncanny Metabolism
effects: When you roll Initiative, regain one expended Focus Point and roll your Martial Arts die to regain hit points equal to the roll.

name: Monastic Tradition
effects: Choose a Monastic Tradition that shapes the nature of your martial practice.

name: Deflect Attacks
effects: Use your reaction when hit by an attack to reduce the damage by 1d10 + DEX modifier + monk level. If reduced to 0, you can spend 1 Focus Point to redirect the attack at the attacker.

name: Slow Fall
effects: Use your reaction when you fall to reduce falling damage by five times your monk level.

name: Extra Attack
effects: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

name: Stunning Strike
effects: Spend 1 Focus Point after hitting a creature to force a CON save or stun it until the start of your next turn.

name: Empowered Strikes
effects: Your unarmed strikes count as magical for the purpose of overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.

name: Stillness of Mind
effects: As an action, end one effect on yourself that is causing you to be charmed or frightened.

name: Acrobatic Movement
effects: You can move across vertical surfaces and liquids without falling during the move.

name: Heightened Focus
effects: Your Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step of the Wind each gain additional benefits.

name: Self-Restoration
effects: At the end of your turn, end one of the following conditions on yourself: Charmed, Frightened, or Poisoned.

name: Deflect Energy
effects: Your Deflect Attacks now works against ranged spell attacks as well as weapon attacks.

name: Disciplined Survivor
effects: Proficiency in all saving throws. Add proficiency bonus to any saving throw you're not already proficient in.

name: Perfect Focus
effects: When you roll Initiative with no Focus Points remaining, you regain 4 Focus Points.

name: Superior Defense
effects: At the start of your turn, spend 3 Focus Points to gain resistance to all damage until the start of your next turn.

name: Body and Mind
effects: Your DEX and WIS each increase by 4. Your maximum for those scores increases to 25.

name: Lay on Hands
effects: Restore a total of 5 × paladin level hit points as an action. Can also cure one disease or neutralize one poison per 5 HP used.

name: Divine Sense
effects: As an action, know the location of celestials, fiends, and undead within 60 feet that aren't behind total cover. Usable 1 + CHA modifier times per long rest.

name: Weapon Mastery
effects: Use the mastery property of up to two weapons you're proficient with. Switch to a different weapon's mastery when you finish a long rest.

name: Fighting Style
effects: Adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty.

name: Divine Smite
effects: When you hit with a melee weapon attack, expend a spell slot to deal radiant damage: 2d8 per slot level (+ 1d8 against undead or fiends). Now triggers automatically on crits.

name: Channel Divinity
effects: Channel divine energy to fuel a magical effect. Number of uses and effects depend on your Sacred Oath.

name: Sacred Oath
effects: Swear a Sacred Oath that binds you as a paladin forever. Choose your oath to determine your subclass features and oath spells.

name: Extra Attack
effects: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

name: Faithful Steed
effects: Cast Find Steed once per long rest without expending a spell slot.

name: Aura of Protection
effects: Whenever you or a friendly creature within 10 feet (30 at level 17) makes a saving throw, the creature gains a bonus to the saving throw equal to your CHA modifier (minimum +1).

name: Abjure Enemies
effects: As an action, present your holy symbol and utter a prayer of denunciation. Each creature of your choice within 60 feet must make a WIS save or be frightened and its speed reduced to 0 until the end of your next turn.

name: Aura of Courage
effects: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet (30 at level 17) can't be frightened while you are conscious.

name: Radiant Strikes
effects: Your melee weapon strikes carry divine power. When you hit with a melee weapon, deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

name: Restoring Touch
effects: When you use Lay on Hands to restore hit points to a creature, also end one of: Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Frightened, Paralyzed, or Stunned on that creature.

name: Aura Expansion
effects: Aura of Protection and Aura of Courage now extend to 30 feet.

name: Sacred Weapon
effects: As a bonus action, imbue one weapon you hold with positive energy. For 1 minute, add your CHA modifier to attack rolls and the weapon emits bright light in a 20-foot radius.

name: Expertise
effects: Choose two of your skill proficiencies to gain double proficiency bonus.

name: Favored Enemy
effects: You always have the Hunter's Mark spell prepared and can cast it twice without expending a spell slot. You regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

name: Weapon Mastery
effects: Use the mastery property of up to two weapons you're proficient with.

name: Fighting Style
effects: Adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty.

name: Deft Explorer
effects: Expertise in one skill. You can speak, read, and write two languages of your choice.

name: Ranger Subclass
effects: Choose a ranger subclass (archetype) that grants you new features.

name: Roving
effects: Your speed increases by 10 feet while not wearing heavy armor. You gain a climb and swim speed equal to your walking speed.

name: Extra Attack
effects: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

name: Tireless
effects: As an action, give yourself temporary HP equal to 1d8 + WIS modifier. Use this a number of times equal to your WIS modifier, regaining uses on a long rest.

name: Fleet of Foot
effects: You can take the Dash action as a bonus action.

name: Foe Slayer
effects: Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with a weapon, you can add your WIS modifier to the attack roll or the damage roll.

name: Relentless Hunter
effects: Taking damage can't break your concentration on Hunter's Mark.

name: Feral Senses
effects: You gain preternatural senses. When you attack a creature you can't see, your inability to see it doesn't impose disadvantage on your attack rolls against it.

name: Foe Slayer (Improved)
effects: Your Hunter's Mark now grants you an extra attack against the marked creature when you use Extra Attack.

name: Sorcerous Origin
effects: Choose a sorcerous origin that grants you features at level 1, 6, 14, and 18.

name: Innate Sorcery
effects: As a bonus action, unleash the magic within you for 1 minute. During this time, the spell save DC of your sorcerer spells increases by 1, and you have advantage on attack rolls of sorcerer spells. Usable twice per long rest.

name: Font of Magic
effects: You have a pool of Sorcery Points equal to your sorcerer level. Spend them to create spell slots or to power Metamagic options.

name: Sorcery Points
effects: Points used to fuel Metamagic and other sorcerer abilities. Regain all expended points on a long rest.

name: Metamagic
effects: Gain the ability to twist your spells. Choose two Metamagic options (more at levels 10 and 17): Careful Spell, Distant Spell, Empowered Spell, Extended Spell, Heightened Spell, Quickened Spell, Seeking Spell, Subtle Spell, Transmuted Spell, or Twinned Spell.

name: Sorcerous Origin Feature
effects: Gain a feature from your chosen Sorcerous Origin.

name: Magical Guidance
effects: Spend 1 Sorcery Point to reroll an ability check you just made.

name: Sorcerous Restoration
effects: Regain 4 expended Sorcery Points when you finish a short rest.

name: Otherworldly Patron
effects: Choose an otherworldly patron that grants you expanded spell list, features at levels 1, 6, 10, and 14.

name: Pact Magic
effects: Spell slots are all the same level (your pact slot level) and recover on a short or long rest. Cantrips known increase as you level.

name: Eldritch Invocations
effects: Choose 2 invocations from the Eldritch Invocations list. You can replace one each time you gain a warlock level. Gain more invocations at levels 5, 7, 9, 12, 15, and 18.

name: Pact Boon
effects: Your otherworldly patron bestows a gift for your loyal service: Pact of the Blade, Pact of the Chain, or Pact of the Tome.

name: Patron Feature
effects: Gain a feature from your otherworldly patron.

name: Mystic Arcanum (6th level)
effects: Choose a 6th-level spell from the warlock list as an arcanum. Cast it once without expending a spell slot. Regain this use on a long rest.

name: Mystic Arcanum (7th level)
effects: Choose a 7th-level spell from the warlock list as an arcanum.

name: Mystic Arcanum (8th level)
effects: Choose an 8th-level spell from the warlock list as an arcanum.

name: Mystic Arcanum (9th level)
effects: Choose a 9th-level spell from the warlock list as an arcanum.

name: Eldritch Master
effects: Spend 1 minute in entreaty with your patron to regain all expended Pact Magic spell slots. Usable once per long rest.

name: Draconic Ancestry
effects: Choose a dragon type. This determines your breath weapon damage type and damage resistance.

name: Breath Weapon
effects: As a bonus action, exhale destructive energy in a 15-foot cone or 30-foot line. Creatures must make a DEX, CON, or STR save (DC 8 + CON mod + prof bonus) or take 1d10 damage (scales with level). Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

name: Damage Resistance
effects: Resistance to the damage type associated with your Draconic Ancestry.

name: Darkvision
effects: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

name: Dwarven Armor Training
effects: You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

name: Fleet of Foot
effects: Your base walking speed increases to 35 feet.

name: Mask of the Wild
effects: You can attempt to hide even when only lightly obscured by foliage, heavy rain, falling snow, mist, or other natural phenomena.

name: Superior Darkvision
effects: You can see in dim light within 120 feet as if it were bright light.

name: Sunlight Sensitivity
effects: Disadvantage on attack rolls and Perception checks that rely on sight when you or your target is in direct sunlight.

name: Drow Magic
effects: You know the Dancing Lights cantrip. At 3rd level, you can cast Faerie Fire once per long rest. At 5th level, you can cast Darkness once per long rest. Spellcasting ability is CHA.

name: Drow Weapon Training
effects: Proficiency with rapiers, shortswords, and hand crossbows.

name: Darkvision
effects: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light.

name: Gnome Cunning
effects: Advantage on all INT, WIS, and CHA saving throws against magic.

name: Natural Illusionist
effects: You know the Minor Illusion cantrip. INT is your spellcasting ability for it.

name: Speak with Small Beasts
effects: Through sounds and gestures, you can communicate simple ideas with Small or smaller beasts.

name: Artificer's Lore
effects: Whenever you make a History check related to magic items, alchemical objects, or technological devices, add twice your proficiency bonus.

name: Tinker
effects: Using tinker's tools, you can spend 1 hour and 10 gp to construct a Tiny clockwork device (AC 5, 1 HP). Up to 3 such devices at a time. Clockwork devices stop working after 24 hours or when you dismantle them.

name: Giant Ancestry
effects: Choose one of six giant ancestries: Cloud (Misty Step), Fire (Fire Bolt, burning hands), Frost (Frost Fingers, Armor of Agathys), Hill (Shillelagh, Heroism), Stone (Resistance, Entangle), Storm (Thunderclap, Thunderwave). Use the magical ability once per long rest.

name: Large Form
effects: As a bonus action, magically grow to Large size for 10 minutes. While Large, you have advantage on STR checks and saves, speed increases by 10 feet, and your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 damage. Usable once per long rest.

name: Powerful Build
effects: Count as one size larger when determining carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

name: Natural Athlete
effects: Proficiency in the Athletics skill.

name: Stout Resilience
effects: Advantage on saving throws against poison. Resistance against poison damage.

name: Adrenaline Rush
effects: Take the Dash action as a bonus action. When you do, gain temporary HP equal to your proficiency bonus. Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, regaining uses on a long rest.

name: Darkvision
effects: You can see in dim light within 120 feet as if it were bright light.

name: Powerful Build
effects: Count as one size larger when determining carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

name: Relentless Endurance
effects: When you are reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 HP instead. Once used, you must finish a long rest before you can use this feature again.

name: Darkvision
effects: You can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light.

name: Hellish Resistance
effects: Resistance to fire damage.

name: Infernal Legacy
effects: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. At 3rd level, cast Hellish Rebuke once per long rest as a 2nd-level spell. At 5th level, cast Darkness once per long rest. CHA is your spellcasting ability.

name: Legacy of Avernus
effects: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. At 3rd level, cast Searing Smite once per long rest as a 2nd-level spell. At 5th level, cast Branding Smite once per long rest. CHA is your spellcasting ability.

name: Frenzy
effects: When you enter rage, you can go into a frenzy. For the duration of your rage, you can make a single melee weapon attack as a bonus action on each of your turns.

name: Mindless Rage
effects: You can't be charmed or frightened while raging. If you are charmed or frightened when you enter your rage, the effect is suspended for the duration of the rage.

name: Intimidating Presence
effects: As an action, frighten someone. Creature within 30 feet must succeed on a WIS save (DC 8 + prof bonus + CHA modifier) or be frightened until the end of your next turn.

name: Retaliation
effects: When you take damage from a creature within 5 feet, you can use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against that creature.

name: Bonus Proficiencies
effects: Gain proficiency in three skills of your choice.

name: Cutting Words
effects: Use your reaction and expend one Bardic Inspiration die to subtract the roll from a creature's attack roll, ability check, or damage roll.

name: Additional Magical Secrets
effects: Learn two spells of your choice from any class. They count as bard spells for you.

name: Peerless Skill
effects: When you make an ability check, you can expend one Bardic Inspiration die and add the result to your ability check.

name: Combat Wild Shape
effects: Use Wild Shape as a bonus action. While in beast form, spend spell slots as a bonus action to regain 1d8 HP per spell level.

name: Circle Forms
effects: You can use Wild Shape to transform into beasts with a higher CR than normal (CR 1 at level 2, scaling up).

name: Primal Strike
effects: Your attacks in beast form count as magical for overcoming resistance and immunity.

name: Elemental Wild Shape
effects: Spend two uses of Wild Shape to transform into an air, earth, fire, or water elemental.

name: Thousand Forms
effects: You can cast Alter Self at will, without expending a spell slot.

name: Open Hand Technique
effects: When you hit a creature with Flurry of Blows, impose one effect: prone, pushed 15 feet, or can't take reactions until your next turn.

name: Wholeness of Body
effects: Regain HP equal to three times your monk level once per long rest as an action.

name: Tranquility
effects: At the end of a long rest, gain the effect of a Sanctuary spell that lasts until you make an attack, cast a damaging spell, or end a long rest.

name: Quivering Palm
effects: Spend 3 Focus Points when you hit to set up lethal vibrations. Use an action later to force a CON save or reduce the target to 0 HP.

name: Devoted Strike
effects: Sacred Flame cantrip. Sacred Weapon: imbue one weapon with CHA bonus to attack rolls.

name: Turn the Unholy
effects: Channel Divinity: Each fiend and undead that can see or hear you within 30 feet must make a WIS save or be turned for 1 minute.

name: Aura of Devotion
effects: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet can't be charmed while you are conscious. At 18th level, extends to 30 feet.

name: Purity of Spirit
effects: Always under the effects of Protection from Evil and Good.

name: Holy Nimbus
effects: As an action, emanate an aura of sunlight for 1 minute. Bright light fills a 30-foot radius, dim light extends 30 more feet. Enemies in bright light take 10 radiant damage at the start of each turn.

name: Hunter's Prey
effects: Choose one: Colossus Slayer (extra 1d8 damage when target is below max HP), Giant Killer (reaction attack against Large+ attackers), or Horde Breaker (attack a second nearby creature once per turn).

name: Defensive Tactics
effects: Choose one: Escape the Horde (opportunity attacks against you have disadvantage), Multiattack Defense (+4 AC after being hit), or Steel Will (advantage on saves vs. frightened).

name: Multiattack
effects: Choose one: Volley (ranged attack vs. all creatures in 10-foot radius) or Whirlwind Attack (melee attack vs. all creatures within 5 feet).

name: Superior Hunter's Defense
effects: Choose one: Evasion (DEX save for half = no damage on success), Stand Against the Tide (redirect missed attacks to another creature), or Uncanny Dodge (reaction to halve damage from one attack).

name: Dragon Ancestor
effects: Choose a dragon type. You can speak, read, and write Draconic. Charisma checks with dragons have advantage.

name: Draconic Resilience
effects: Max HP increases by 1 per sorcerer level. When not wearing armor, your AC equals 13 + DEX modifier.

name: Elemental Affinity
effects: Add CHA modifier to damage of spells matching your ancestor's damage type. Spend 1 Sorcery Point to gain resistance to that damage type for 1 hour.

name: Dragon Wings
effects: Sprout draconic wings as a bonus action, gaining a fly speed equal to your walking speed.

name: Draconic Presence
effects: Spend 5 Sorcery Points to draw on your draconic power and exude an aura of awe or fear for 1 minute.

name: Dark One's Blessing
effects: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP, gain temporary HP equal to your CHA modifier + your warlock level.

name: Expanded Spell List
effects: Add Burning Hands, Command, Blindness/Deafness, Scorching Ray, Fireball, Stinking Cloud, Fire Shield, Wall of Fire, Flame Strike, and Hallow to your warlock spell list.

name: Dark One's Own Luck
effects: When you make an ability check or saving throw, add 1d10 to the roll. Once used, must finish a short or long rest before using again.

name: Fiendish Resilience
effects: Choose a damage type when you finish a short or long rest. You gain resistance to that damage type until you choose a different one.

name: Hurl Through Hell
effects: When you hit with an attack, banish the target through a hellish demiplane. It returns at the end of your next turn, taking 10d10 psychic damage.
